summary: Completed comprehensive testing of trading application. Backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend Research tab functioning correctly without Quick View placeholder. Some navigation issues found between Research and Structure tabs.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking Structure tab sometimes redirects to Prediction page instead of showing TA Explorer

passed_tests: ✅ API /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/BTC works and returns patterns (Rectangle pattern, Confidence: 0.42)
✅ Timeframe switcher (4H, 1D, 7D, 1M, 6M, 1Y) works properly - all 6 timeframes functional
✅ Research tab does NOT show Quick View placeholder (requirement 1 PASSED)
✅ Research tab shows Pattern card information (Double Bottom, Loose Range patterns detected)
✅ Tech Analysis page loads correctly with Research, Structure, Signals, Execution, Deep tabs
✅ Pattern detection working properly with visual pattern cards displayed
✅ Chart rendering functional with candlestick data and technical overlays
✅ Bootstrap successfully launched with TA Engine + Exchange Intelligence data loaded
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Structure tab navigation issue - clicking Structure tab should show TA Explorer with Pattern Lifecycle filtering, not redirect to Prediction page. Verify TA Explorer has 3 tabs (Patterns, Analysis, No Trade) and Pattern Lifecycle buttons are clickable.
